evaluation of special ug only courses tech
project evaluation dugc will appoint committee for tech
the committee will ensure that award of letter grade would be as per relative grading policy
the evaluation will be based on the report and viva voce examination on the project
dugc will form the evaluation criterion and declare it to students
composition of department undergraduate committee dugc the dugc will be constituted of all ug faculty advisors and head of department
the head of department will be the chairperson and one of the faculty advisors would be the convenor
engineering innovation at the completion of an engineering innovation project the student will submit report which will be evaluated by duly appointed examiner by dugc
the evaluation will be based on the report and viva voce examination on the project entrepreneurship and letter grade is awarded
evaluation policy has to be declared by the concerned department from the first day of the class
design project evaluation at the completion of project the student will submit project report which will be evaluated by duly appointed examiner by dugc
the evaluation will be based on the report and viva voce examination on the project and or grade is awarded
evaluation policy has to be declared by the concerned department from the first day of the class
conduct and evaluation of tech
tech dual degree project allotment of students to supervisors will be made based on the preferences of the students and supervisor
the supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the eighth semester
program would advise until the student is assigned to regular supervisor
the evaluation criterion would be the same as section
entrepreneurship project at the completion of entrepreneurship the student will submit report which will be evaluated by duly appointed examiner by dean academics ug associate dean academics ug
the evaluation will be based on the report and viva voce examination on the entrepreneurship and letter grade is awarded
termination termination from tech
program student may be terminated from the tech
programme by ac if the student is absent without authorized leave of absence for eight weeks or more in semester or fails to report and register by the last date of registration without bonafide reason or violates the code of conduct involves in ragging etc
as confirmed by committee constituted for the purpose or does not earn the prescribed minimum number of credits within the maximum duration of the program or is on academic probation for two consecutive semesters
appeal against termination student who is terminated from the tech
program can appeal to the chairman senate for reconsideration
while making such an appeal the student is expected to give reasons for poor academic performance and or why the termination should be reconsidered
the senate shall take final decision after considering all the available inputs
but the senate will not entertain any further appeal for review unless substantial additional information is brought to its notice
leave rules application for leave of absence should be addressed to the convener dugc and submitted with medical certificate if applicable
usually leave must not be availed of without prior approval of the dugc
mid semester recess and vacation undergraduate students are entitled to avail of mid semester recess and vacation as specified in the academic calendar
short leave student may be granted leave of absence during the semester for maximum of days on medical grounds and for days for any other valid reason
semester withdrawal it may be applicable in unforeseen circumstances or for medical reasons
absence for period of four or more weeks in any semester will result in automatic withdrawal from that semester
dugc can approve and intimate office of academics regarding the leave of the student for records
in case the leave extends beyond semester it can only be approved through the academic committee
semester withdrawal on the medical ground will not be counted towards the maximum permissible duration of the programme for the student
academic leave to help students broaden their horizons and gain course work experience she he may be permitted to proceed to other academic institutes industry organization in india or abroad
academic leave can be requested for any of the following reasons such as fieldwork experimental work training using specialized facility not available at iitj entrepreneurship initiative engineering innovation exchange program as part of an exchange program with an academic institution in india or abroad internship work all such requests must be evaluated and approved by dugc before the leave is granted
student may be allowed to spend maximum duration of one summer term and two semesters on academic leave
student during academic leave can earn maximum of credits per semester as certified by the dugc and approved by the course equivalence committee
branch change an undergraduate student is eligible to apply for branch change at the end of the second semester only provided the student satisfies the following criteria
secured cgpa at the end of the second semester of
greater than or equal to for sc st and pd applicants ii
greater than or equal to for other applicants
completed all prescribed course credits for the first two semesters including the non graded courses
no backlog at the end of the second semester
the student should have no disciplinary action against him her
change of the branch will be permitted strictly in the order of merit as determined by cgpa at the end of the second semester
each available seat may be occupied by students of any category
for students of sc st pd category concession in eligibility criteria is given as per rule
in case more than one student applying for branch change have the same cgpa the tie shall be resolved on the basis of jee ranks of such applicants
in making change of branch the strength of branch should not fall below of the sanctioned strength and should not go above of the sanctioned strength
the conditions mentioned in item above will not be insisted upon for change to branch in which vacancy exists with reference to the sanctioned strengths and the concerned student was eligible as per jee rank for admission to that branch at the time of entry to iit jodhpur
notwithstanding any of the conditions listed above student with cgpa of or more at the end of the second semester will be allowed to move to branch of his her choice
requirements for graduation student is deemed to have completed the requirements for graduation if she he has met the conditions laid down in clauses to
minimum duration of residence minimum duration of residence is given in the table below table minimum residential requirement no
program minimum duration of residence in semesters
including minor department interdisciplinary area specialization
academic the student shall be declared to have fulfilled the academic requirements if she he has earned the minimum credits as per table in section for all degrees
payment of fees and dues the degree will be awarded after obtaining no dues clearance from all concerned sections as deemed necessary by dean academics
no case of disciplinary action the student shall not be considered to have completed the academic requirements if there is any case of indiscipline pending against her him
completion of engagement in ncc nss or nso the student should have completed extra curricular activity like performing arts sports national cadet corps national service schemes and national sports organisation for period of at least two semesters during their tech
award of degrees provisional certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to can be provided provisional certificate by the office of dean academics on the approval of chairman senate
certificate will have mention of major minor department or interdisciplinary specialization wherever applicable
degree certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to is recommended by the senate to the board of governors bog for the award of the appropriate degree in the ensuing convocation
the degree can be awarded only after the bog accords its approval
the certificate will have mention of major minor department or interdisciplinary specialization wherever applicable
amendments notwithstanding anything contained in this document the senate of iit jodhpur reserves the right to modify amend without notice the curricula procedures requirements and rules pertaining to its tech
regulations for postgraduate programmes
postgraduate programmes the indian institute of technology jodhpur currently offers the following postgraduate programmes
master of science sc
dual degree sc tech
master of technology tech
dual degree tech phd
doctor of philosophy ph
postgraduate admissions the process of admission for all the programs offered by the institute normally is underway during april may for semester and during november december for semester
in addition the department may process applications for admissions to phd programs on continuous basis and admit students as per the existing procedure
categories of admission candidate can be admitted in any one of the following categories
full time regular ii
full time sponsored iii
part time iv
external executive however all categories are not applicable for all pg programs
further programmes can be offered in combination of these modes like fully sponsored part time program
full time regular in campus student who can register for up to full credit permissible per semester
student supported by project of the institute will be considered full time regular student
ii full time sponsored in campus student who can register for up to full credit permissible per semester
the candidate is sponsored either by his her employer or by self
self sponsored candidate must have two years of relevant industrial academic experience
iii part time part time student is working professional who while employed attend regular classes as per the schedule of the institute
the student must be employed in the neighbourhood of iit jodhpur
the student must produce noc from the employer for pursuing the programme at iit jodhpur
the student can register only for limited number of credits as compared to full time regular student
iv external student working in an industry establishment academic institution which is equipped with the necessary research and library facilities
the employer must relieve the student to stay in the campus to complete the minimum residency requirements
executive only for
professional who can carry out complete the programme requirement in
an accelerated fashion minimum in months or
accumulates credits as per convenience and petitions degree in maximum of years
the part time or full time mode by attending courses offered in synchronized remote contact mode and limited direct interaction eligibility for admission the eligibility conditions given below are the absolute minimum
departments may prescribe any requirements over and above subject to the approval of the senate
the number of admissions that can be made to any program shall be decided by the senate from time to time
reservation of seats for various reserved categories shall be prescribed by the board of governors
admission to sc
program regular the admission to the sc
programs offered by the institute will be through any one of the following two avenues
the applicants qualified through the joint admission test for master jam organized by iits
the applicants having bachelor degree in any relevant discipline or year program may be admitted based on written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
the applicants under the category must have minimum of marks for gen obc for sc st category in aggregate or as specified by the university institute or minimum cgpa of for gen obc for sc st category on the scale of with corresponding proportional requirements when the scales are other than on for example for gen obc category for sc st on scale of or first class as specified by the university institute
admission to sc tech dual degree program regular the admission to the sc tech
dual degree programs offered by the institute will be through any one of the following two avenues
the applicants qualified through the joint admission test for master jam organized by iits
the applicants having bachelor degree in any relevant discipline or year program may be admitted based on written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
the applicants under the category must have minimum of marks for gen obc for sc st category in aggregate or as specified by the university institute or minimum cgpa of for gen obc for sc st category on the scale of with corresponding proportional requirements when the scales are other than on for example for gen obc category for sc st on scale of or first class as specified by the university institute
admission to tech program regular the applicant must have bachelor degree in engineering or science year program or master degree in science mca pharmacy medical sciences agricultural sciences and veterinary sciences or in related field minimum of marks for gen obc for sc st category in aggregate or as specified by the university institute or minimum cgpa of for gen obc for sc st category on the scale of with corresponding proportional requirements when the scales are other than on for example for gen obc category for sc st on scale of or first class as specified by the university institute
the applicant must either have valid gate score or exempted from gate as per mhrd circular or have qualified an equivalent national examination or have qualified in the written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
admission to mtech program executive part time external sponsored the applicant must have bachelor degree in engineering or science year program or master degree in science mca pharmacy medical science agricultural science and veterinary science or in related field
minimum of marks for gen obc for sc st category in aggregate or as specified by the university institute or minimum cgpa of for gen obc for sc st category on the scale of with corresponding proportional requirements when the scales are other than on for example for gen obc category for sc st on scale of or first class as specified by the university institute
the applicant must have minimum of two years of work experience after qualifying degree in industry laboratories academic institutions at the time of registration to the program
however the credit accumulation for the program may start immediately after the qualifying degree
petitioning for the degree can happen only year after registration
the applicant must qualify the written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
admission to tech
ph dual degree program regular the applicant must have bachelor degree in engineering or science year program or master degree in science mca pharmacy medical science agricultural science and veterinary science or in related field minimum of marks for gen obc for sc st category in aggregate or as specified by the university institute or minimum cgpa of for gen obc for sc st category on the scale of with corresponding proportional requirements when the scales are other than on for example for gen obc category for sc st on scale of or first class as specified by the university institute
the applicant must either have valid gate score or exempted from gate as per mhrd circular or have qualified an equivalent national examination or have qualified in the written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
admission to ph
program regular candidates admitted in this category shall not be registered student in any other academic program in india or abroad and shall not be full time or part time employee of any organization in india or abroad
the applicant must have master degree in engineering pharmacy agricultural science science humanities social sciences management with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen gen ews obc for sc st or the applicant must have mbbs with md ms bvsc with mvsc bds with mds bpth with mpth both with moth or equivalent with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen gen ews obc for sc st in bachelor degree or the applicant must have bachelor degree of minimum four year duration in engineering or science or medicine or pharmacy or agricultural science or veterinary science or equivalent with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen obc for sc st
admission under any special scheme like quality improvement programme qip defence personnel the procedures and criteria for admission of these candidates can be decided with the approval of chairman senate
admission of indian nationals residing abroad inra and foreign nationals inra candidates must have been residing abroad continuously for at least one year at the time of applying for admission
the applications of inra and foreign nationals may be processed by the departments as and when they are received or according to any schedule convenient to the department
the applications should be scrutinized to make sure that both in terms of qualifications and attainment they are comparable with the candidates admitted in the general category
department will conduct vc based interview for ascertaining suitability of the candidate
the applications of foreign nationals who are sponsored by the indian council of cultural relations iccr will be scrutinized by the department concerned to assess their suitability for admission to the programme
the department recommendation will be sent to the chairperson senate through the chairperson ac
admission to ph sponsored external part time candidates admitted in this category shall not be registered student in any other academic program in india or abroad
the applicant must have master degree in engineering pharmacy agricultural science science humanities social sciences management with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen gen ews obc for sc st or the applicant must have mbbs with md ms bvsc with mvsc bds with mds bpth with mpth both with moth or equivalent with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen gen ews obc for sc st in bachelor degree or the applicant must have bachelor degree of minimum four year duration in engineering or science or medicine or pharmacy or agricultural science or veterinary science or equivalent with at least marks or at least cpi or cgpa for gen obc for sc st
the applicant must have minimum of two years of work experience after qualifying degree in industry laboratories academic institutions at the time of registration to the program
the applicant must qualify the written test and or interview conducted by iit jodhpur
admission of non degree students non degree student is student who is registered for degree in recognized institute or university in india or abroad and who is officially sponsored by that institute or university to complete part of his her academic requirements at iit jodhpur
for that purpose the non degree student may carry out research or take courses for credit or otherwise or may use other academic facilities
any candidate can be admitted as casual student for specific courses provided the candidate satisfies the minimum eligibility criteria specified in section
the application must be routed through the office of dean
students so admitted will be governed by all rules regulations and discipline of the institute
reservation policy the reservation policy of government of india will be followed

change of registration from tech
programme to tech ph dual degree programme regular student registered for the tech
programme having cgpa or more at the end of the second semester may be allowed to switch to tech ph dual degree program till the end of the third semester
as special case student can switch to dual degree in the fourth semester with the approval of drc provided his her cgpa is or more who will then be required to complete his her candidacy requirements by the end of the fifth semester
all conditions of tech ph dual degree program will be applicable to all such students
all such changes of registration shall be reported to the senate

to part time ph
program part time tech
student having cgpa or more after completion of at least credits may be allowed to change his her registration to the ph program
the credits earned will be counted towards his her ph course work requirements
change of registration from full time to part time external ph programme student admitted to full time ph programme may be permitted to change to part time ph programme
student requesting such conversion must have successfully completed his her candidacy requirement ii get the request endorsed by the supervisor and the drc iii produce no objection certificate from his her employer for carrying out the research work

ph programmes respectively

leave rules application for leave of absence should be addressed to the convener drc and submitted with medical certificate if applicable
usually leave must not be availed of without prior approval of the drc
leave maximum of days in an academic year including leave on medical grounds mid semester break
the student must apply for leave in advance even during the summer winter term or mid semester break
phd student can not avail leave for more than days at stretch an tech sc
student can not avail leave for more than days at stretch the leave beyond days in an academic year may be granted in exceptional cases by drc without assistantship during that period
other leaves maternity leave for ph students is sanctioned as per the directives of mhrd
it will not be counted towards the maximum permissible duration of the programme
any other leave may also be permissible as per the guidelines of mhrd
semester withdrawal may be applicable in unforeseen circumstances or for medical reasons
absence for period of four or more weeks in any semester will result in automatic withdrawal from that semester
in all such cases the fellowship will be stopped with immediate effect and it will be continued for only after the student rejoins the institute
drc can approve and intimate office of academics regarding the leave of the student for records
in case the leave extends beyond semester it can only be approved through the academic committee
semester withdrawal on the medical ground will not be counted towards the maximum permissible duration of the programme for the student
academic leave academic leave can be requested for any of the following reasons such as
library work because of specialized collection at particular library
experimental work training using specialized facility not available at iitj
attending conferences workshops summer winter schools symposium
collaborative work as part of joint tech ph
collaborative work for specific problem related to his ongoing ph programme as indicated in his research proposal
exchange program as part of an exchange program with sister institution in india or abroad all such requests must be evaluated and approved by src drc irc before the leave is granted
src drc irc must also make recommendations regarding continuation of fellowship during academic leave
student may be allowed to spend maximum duration of one year on academic leave
student during academic leave can earn maximum of credits per semester as certified by src and approved by drc
financial assistance financial assistantship scholarship will be provided to the eligible students admitted under regular full time program
the eligibility criteria are as per the following sc
program merit cum means fellowship as per institute norms
dual degree program student having completed minimum credit requirements of an sc
program at the end of the second year with cgpa or have qualified gate can have financial support from mhrd or project fund
program regular tech
student with gate can have financial support from mhrd or project fund
student may be exempted from gate as per mhrd guidelines
executive tech program students admitted in this category will not be provided any financial assistance from the institute
ph dual degree program rules and regulations governing financial assistance for dual degree students will be at par with regular ph students
program regular ph student admitted to the institute will be eligible for financial assistance as per the norms of iit jodhpur
candidate having tech
four year program master degree with gate net jrf nbhm or equivalent can have financial assistance as per mhrd norms or equivalent applicable for non science departments
the requirement of gate is exempted for an applicant with tech or equivalent post bachelor degree student may be exempted from gate as per mhrd guidelines
ph student would be eligible for enhancement in the scholarship after two years provided the student has met qualifier requirement
the enhanced fellowship will commence from the date of completion of both the conditions
no arrears will be provided due to delay in completing the qualifier requirement
the teaching research assistantship of ph student shall stop from the day of submission of the thesis
rules and regulation for conduct and evaluation of tech sc
project allotment of students to supervisors will be made based on the preferences of the students and supervisor
the supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the first semester
program would advise until the student is assigned to regular supervisor
each semester letter grade will be awarded after examination by committee consisting of drc supervisor and two members conversant with the field of research with at least one member external to the department maybe outside the institute also
drc will appoint examiners in consultation with the supervisor
the same committee may examine more than one thesis
external member can be on vc
drc will ensure that award of letter grade would be as per relative grading policy
regular full time student must register for tech project part in the summer semester following nd semester
he must obtain satisfactory grade to continue tech project part in the next semester
his performance in the summer semester will be evaluated by his supervisor
rules and regulations for ph
dual degree program thesis supervisor selection of ph
candidates the selection should be based on merit and capability of the candidate to conduct research
there should at least be faculty member available or likely to join in the areas of interest of the candidate at the time of selection
appointment of thesis supervisor ph
students shall be admitted in the department and no supervisor shall be assigned at the time of selection
allotment of students to supervisor will be made based on the preferences of the students and supervisor
for both ph
dual degree supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the first semester the convener drc department research committee coordinator interdisciplinary research program would advise until the student is assigned to regular supervisor
there shall not be more than two supervisors in general for student
additional supervisor can be allowed with the approval of chairman senate
supervisor from outside the institute before the qualifier may be appointed on the request of student supervisor with the recommendation of the drc irc and the dean academics and approval of the chairman senate
the external supervisor will be requested to sign intellectual property right ipr and non disclosure agreement nda documents as part of acceptance
from the financial point of view the institute will have no obligation to the external supervisor
caretaker supervisor additional supervisor whenever the supervisor proceeds on short leave for period up to one year the drc irc interdisciplinary research committee shall appoint caretaker supervisor in consultation with the supervisor and the student to take care of the administrative requirements
whenever the supervisor proceeds on long leave for period more than year then an additional supervisor needs to be appointed on the suggestion of the supervisor
the supervisor going on lien or sabbatical may continue supervising students and the supervisor can opt for either an additional supervisor or caretaker supervisor
the supervisor on his her retirement or on resignation may continue as supervisor and will have to opt for an additional supervisor provided the student has cleared qualifier before the supervisor retirement resignation
composition of departmental research committee drc the drc will consist of coordinators of tech tech ph dual degree and ph programs of the department head of the department and senior professor associate professor proposed by the head
the drc will be chaired by professor associate professor nominated by head of the department
the chairman of the drc will be member of the academic committee
the drc has to be approved by dean academics
ph program coordinator will be the convenor of drc and will be proposed by the head
the tenure for the drc will be years
composition of interdisciplinary research committee irc the irc will consist of all coordinators of idrps and senior professor associate professor as the chairman of the irc will be nominated by dean academics
the chairman of irc will be member of ac
one of the idrp co ordinators would be convenor of the committee
the tenure for the irc will be years
the irc will be approved by the dean academics
change of research supervisor change of supervisor under exceptional circumstances shall be permitted by dean academics on the recommendation of the drc irc after obtaining the consent of the student ii the present supervisor and iii the proposed supervisor
if required realignment of student research program will happen under the supervision of the drc irc
student research committee src composition of src the src will normally consist of supervisor and three other faculty members conversant with the field of research with at least one member external to the department maybe outside the institute also
student research committee src for the candidate shall be proposed by the supervisor recommended by the drc irc and approved by dean academics
the src shall have one member identified as chairman for administrative functions and the supervisor will act as convener
chairman src is to be appointed by dean academics
the appointment of src should be completed by the end of the first semester
any subsequent changes in the composition of src shall be communicated through the drc irc to dean academics for record
chairman and supervisor shall be the internal examiners for the evaluation of the thesis
the src is expected to monitor the progress of the candidate until the completion of the program
annual progress monitoring meeting apm the academic progress of all registered ph students will be reviewed once in year by the src and peers in the institute
the review will be based upon annual progress report and ii poster presentation open to all
src will award satisfactory non satisfactory grade based upon and ii
two consecutive non satisfactory grades will lead to termination of registration
for implementational convenience academic calendar must indicate two days in year for conducting annual progress evaluation of research scholars
following the groupings of students and scheduling guidelines are suggested
for students joining in 1st semester of ay during 1st july to 30th september of the year
for students joining in 2nd semester of ay during 1st december to 28th february of the year
the first apm will be conducted after the successful completion of qualifier requirements
each semester satisfactory progress or unsatisfactory progress will be reported by the supervisor through the src for record
any situation in exception to the above will be processed by the academic committee and approved by dean academics qualifier requirements of ph student the following four components together will constitute qualifier candidacy requirements for ph
student and for ph
candidate to be eligible for the enhanced srf fellowship
completed course requirements with the minimum cgpa specified in section
cleared comprehensive examination
successful presentation on state of the art of the chosen field of research
successful presentation and defense of research proposal the ph
students are normally expected to complete successfully the qualifier requirements before the beginning of the fifth semester of his her registration in the ph
program and in any case not later than the beginning of the sixth semester after their registration in the ph
part time candidates will need to complete the qualifier requirement before the beginning of the seventh semester
comprehensive examination of ph
tech ph student the comprehensive examination must be designed to test the general capability of the student and the breadth of his her knowledge in the discipline and areas related to the field of research
the comprehensive examination shall be conducted by comprehensive examination committee of the department idrp
the comprehensive examination will consist of written test with three papers
departments will offer at least papers for conducting comprehensive examination
each paper will have broad coverage of one essential sub area of the department
the course content of these papers will be approved by the academic committee and the senate
the syllabus of papers for the comprehensive examination will not be the same as courses offered by the department it must be designed to test the breadth of the knowledge in that area
the src will specify set three papers as comprehensive requirement for particular student
these three papers may be selected from across the departments
the comprehensive examination requirements shall be intimated to the ph student within two weeks of src formation
all comprehensive examinations will be scheduled on two fixed days in year
it can coincide with the annual progress evaluation day of doctoral candidates
students may decide to appear for three papers on the same day or on different days
student can appear in the comprehensive examination before he she has completed the course requirements and satisfied the minimum specified cgpa requirement
if the performance of the ph student in comprehensive examination paper in the first attempt is not satisfactory he she will be given one more opportunity to appear within six months of the first attempt
for clearing of the comprehensive examination student must perform satisfactorily in all papers
comprehensive examination to be completed by the students ph within semesters direct ph and mtech phd dual degree within semesters state of art seminar sota every ph student is required to give general seminar in the department covering the state of art of the area of research
the presentation must also include patent landscaping of the area
the presentation will be evaluated by the src
candidate must have satisfactory grade in sota awarded by src for becoming eligible to present his research proposal
research proposal research proposal report presentation will be evaluated by src after successful completion of sota
the research proposal must include representative research work equivalent to research work worth credits
src will allocate letter grade based on the performance of the candidate
candidacy for the ph
degree student enrolled in the ph program is formally admitted to the candidacy for the ph degree after he she has completed the qualifier requirements for the degree
only such students who are admitted to the candidacy will be allowed to submit ph thesis
relaxation in tech
ph dual degree program tech ph dual degree students who have successfully completed all qualifier requirements under exceptional conditions as approved by src after years can also convert into part time external ph student and exit with tech degree if all conditions for part time external conversion are satisfied
the renewal of their registration for every semester however will be considered only if src finds their progress to be satisfactory and recommends the continuance of registration
cancellation of registration the registration of student whose progress is not found to be satisfactory by the src or who has not enrolled will be liable for cancellation
the registration of student who has not submitted his her thesis before the end of the maximum permissible period specified in section will be liable for cancellation
synopsis synopsis will consist of an open seminar and comprehensive internal closed door assessment of the research work through pre synopsis report by src
the student can submit the synopsis only if the src is satisfied with the quality and quantity of the work for submission as ph thesis
publications arising out of the thesis are to be submitted along with the pre synopsis report
students should submit the synopsis and thesis within six months of the open seminar date
if required an extension of three months may be permitted by dean academics on the recommendation of src
if the synopsis and thesis are not submitted in the specified period the student will be asked to present the synopsis again
on satisfactory completion of the prescribed courses with minimum cgpa specified in the comprehensive examination the sota the research work and the synopsis the student shall submit the requisite copies of the synopsis of his her research work in the required format through the supervisor and hod to the academic section for consideration of the src
the student should have at least one paper either published or accepted for publication in refereed journal refereed conference src members are required to certify the quality of journals conference
thesis submission and evaluation the supervisor shall propose list of examiners consisting of at least four faculty members from abroad and faculty members from india who have the expertise in the area in which the student undertook research
for selecting an examiner the following guidelines should be followed the examiners shall have at least years of post ph experience no two proposed examiners shall be from the same organization and the examiners can be faculty members or scientists of standing and repute
chairman senate may ask for additional names for examiners
the chairman senate shall select minimum two examiners from the proposed list of which at least one should be an examiner from outside india
the consent of these examiners shall be taken before sending the thesis to them
in addition src and supervisor shall be the examiners of the thesis
the viva voce will be conducted in the presence of src supervisor and the external examiner
one of the external examiners shall attend the thesis defense
the examiners shall submit written report on the thesis within period of two months from the date of receipt of the thesis
if both examiners declare the thesis as acceptable for award of ph degree the dean academics shall request the supervisor to hold the thesis defense by the student
if any of the examiners reject the thesis for the award of the ph degree the dean academics shall report the matter to the chairman senate for further consideration
the chairman senate will refer the thesis to third examiner under special circumstances else the registration of the student shall stand cancelled in the ph program
if both examiners reject the thesis for the award of the ph degree no degree shall be awarded by the institute and the registration of the student shall stand cancelled in the ph program
if an examiner suggests revision of the thesis the student shall resubmit the thesis after the revision within prescribed time period of months in consultation with the supervisor
when both examiners recommend the thesis as accepted for the student to defend the thesis or after the resubmission of the thesis after incorporating the suggestions corrections given by the examiners the student shall publicly present the thesis and defend the contention of the thesis
the committee consisting of chairman src supervisor the examiner from within india and other faculty members quorum would be chairman src supervisor and an external examiner who participated in the comprehensive examination of the student shall evaluate the thesis defense of the ph student also
on their recommendation dean academics shall recommend to senate to consider the award of ph degree to the student

program qualifications at the time of joining the program minimum duration in semesters of residence

sc section for

dual degree section for tech ph dual degree and section for ph while meeting the minimum cgpa requirements as mentioned in section
no dues clearance degree will be awarded after obtaining no dues clearance from all concerned sections as deemed necessary by dean academics no case of disciplinary action the student shall not be considered to have completed the academic requirements if there is any case of indiscipline pending against her him
award of degrees provisional certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to can be provided with provisional certificate by the office of dean academics on the approval of chairman senate
degree certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to is recommended by the senate to the board of governors bog for the award of the appropriate degree in the ensuing convocation
the degree can be awarded only after the bog accords its approval
amendments notwithstanding anything contained in this document the senate of iit jodhpur reserves the right to modify amend without notice rules and regulations of the postgraduate programmes at iit jodhpur
compute resources computer science engineering iit jodhpur
compute resources the department compute resources include number of powerful servers and workstations designed to handle wide variety of computational tasks including complex data analysis machine learning and high performance computing
with their advanced hardware and capabilities these resources provide researchers and students to the department with reliable and efficient computing power enabling them to tackle complex problems and push the boundaries of their fields
dgx server nvidia designed the dgx server as high performance computing system for deep learning applications
it features interconnected gpus that provide high speed data throughput for massive machine learning and artificial intelligence operations
the dgx is also endowed with nvidia tensor cores which accelerate matrix operations commonly employed in deep learning tasks
one dgx machine with volta gpus and terabytes of ram is available in the cse lab
it comes equipped with an additional terabytes of storage that is all flash based
dpu gpu hpc this architecture combines dpus and gpus in order to accelerate high performance computing tasks such as deep learning scientific simulations and data analytics
dpus are specialized processors designed for data movement and security tasks whereas gpus are designed for computationally intensive tasks like matrix operations
dpu gpu hpc systems can accomplish high throughput and low latency by combining the two making them suitable for variety of applications that require large scale data processing and analysis
the department will have this system shortly
each system will have gb of ram and nvidia a30 gpus
other gpu systems the department has nvidia 1080ti gpu and nvidia a5000 gpu cards for the department users
nvidia geforce gtx ti is graphics card that is often used in deep learning applications due to its powerful cuda cores and high memory bandwidth
it has cuda cores and gb gddr5x memory with memory bandwidth of gb
nvidia a5000 is based on the latest nvidia ampere architecture and features cuda cores tensor cores rt cores 24gb gddr6 with error correction code ecc and bit memory interface
general purpose servers the department has several servers that are used for various purposes including web hosting database management and file storage
these servers are equipped with powerful cpus and storage making them suitable for handling large amounts of data and serving multiple users simultaneously

rules regulations for
by research programs indian institute of technology jodhpur there has been an increasing need to embed innovation components in various academic programs
traditionally research based academic programs emphasize on scholarly publications
however it is also important to recognize other forms of contributions
patents technology development entrepreneurship etc as outcomes of research initiatives
in view of this the institute has sta rted ms by research programs in cross disciplinary multi disciplinary as well as application directed areas
the research problems increasingly require multidisciplinary approach to solve complex problems of interest or propose solutions leading to new innovations and entrepreneurship ventures
today we need in many cases diverse disciplines to engage in spectrum of research based activities ranging from scientific to social issues that challenge contemporary society establishing consistency betwee diverse academic spaces
considerable demand exists for such professionals who can synthesize more than one discipline and create teams of academicians and scholars that enrich the overall educational and research experience
by research programs are expected to be designed for innovative research outcomes in cross disciplinary multi disciplinary areas
such programs are expected to be offered by schools or centres synergising diverse academic disciplines admission will be through the acad emic unit specified admission process
ii innovation driven outcomes leading to eir and or start up admission will be through the academic unit specified admission process
iii targeted deliveries linked to projects sponsored by external agencie only project fellows appointed in delivery oriented project can register in part time mode through drc src crc monitored selection process

rules and regulation for conduct and evaluation of
project thesis allotment of students to supervisors will be made on the preferences of the students and supervisor
the supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the first semester
head or crc would advise the student until the student is assigned to regular supervisor the src will normally consist of supervisor and three other faculty members conversant with the field of research with at least one member external to the center may be outside the institute also
student research committee src for the candidate sh all be proposed by the supervisor recommended by the crc and approved by dean academics
the src shall have one member identified as chairman for administrative functions and the supervisor will act as convener
chairman src is to be appointed dean academics
the appointment of src should be completed by the end of the first semester
any subsequent changes in the composition of src shall be communicated through the crc to dean academics for record
the src and supervisor shall be the internal examiners for the evaluation of the thesis
the src is expected to monitor the progress of the candidate until the completion of the program
more than one student may be allowed to work on problem of multi disc iplinary nature with clear justification and problem statement describing the roles and responsibilities of the students the quality of the work can be assessed in terms of publications patents innovations technology transfers start ups at the end of the project the project thesis will be required to be evaluated by one examiner outside the institute from the list of examiners proposed by the src and the src

no dues clearance degree will be awarded after obtaining no dues clearance from all concerned sections as deemed necessary by dean academics
no case of disciplinary action the student shall not be considered to have completed the academic requirements if there is any case of indiscipline pend ing against her him
award of degrees provisional certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to can be provided provisional certificate by the office of dean academics on the approva of chairman senate
degree certificate student who completes all the graduation requirements specified in clauses to is recommended by the senate to the board of governors bog for the award of the appropriate degree in the ensuing convocation
the degree can be awarded only after the bog accords its approval
withdrawal of degree under extremely exceptional circumstances where gross violation of the graduation requirements is detected at later stage the senate may recommend to the board of governors for withdrawal of egree already awarded to the student

computer science engineering iit jodhpur
welcome to the department of computer science engineering computer science and engineering today plays major role in transforming every aspect of human life in addressing social challenges and catalyzing the ongoing wave of the industrial revolution
the department is driven by its commitment to excel in next generation technology development and research
our mission is to strengthen industry academia collaborations and prepare our students to contribute to multi disciplinary projects and for solving problems of national interest
vision to be among the top departments in terms of research contributions practical impact and applications of computer science and engineering in the country in the next years and internationally well known in some focused areas in the next years
some of our missions are to achieve excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subject for innovative discoveries develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating and develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute
mission our missions are to achieve excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subject for innovative discoveries develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating and develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute
m1 achieving excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subjects for innovative discoveries
m2 develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating within the institute as well by means of international national and regional institutes
the collaborations may be fostered by research visits collaborative projects joint thesis internship guidance research mentoring etc
m3 develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute
m4 embracing shared dialogue across disciplines and encouraging experiential learning to redefine the contours of traditional computer science teaching and learning
be one of the leading departments in the country for hybrid cse education
m5 define and solve real world problems in collaboration with industry and develop industry connect by means of research grants consultancies and collaborative projects
develop start up ecosystem in emerging areas of computing in collaboration with other departments at iit jodhpur
m6 dissemination of knowledge without physical boundaries
classroom online and other modes of teaching to create workforce which is ready to ethically solve technological challenges of the next generation
m7 provide thought leadership in public policy and ethics of emerging computing technologies towards building an equitable and ethical society

department of civil and infrastructure engineering prof subhasish dey fna fasc fnasc fnae fiahr masce jc bose fellow distinguished professor head of department welcome from the head of department greetings and welcome to the department of civil and infrastructure engineering at indian institute of technology iit jodhpur
established with the ethos of excellence and innovation our department stands as cornerstone of the institute academic prowess
since its inception in the department of civil and infrastructure engineering has been at the forefront of shaping the infrastructure landscape of our nation
with rich legacy dating back to our founding year our department has grown into one of the most esteemed and expansive departments at iit jodhpur
boasting talented cohort of esteemed faculty members distributed across various specialized divisions we cater to the academic needs of undergraduate and postgraduate students including thriving community of doctoral scholars
at the heart of our department lies commitment to providing unparalleled educational experiences and fostering cutting edge research endeavours
backed by state of the art laboratories and unwavering support from our dedicated staff members we take pride in being premier destination for aspiring civil engineers seeking top tier education and research opportunities in the country
our faculty members are not only just educators but also pioneers in their respective fields actively engaging with global challenges through their ground breaking research and consulting projects
from addressing critical infrastructure needs to shaping industry standards our faculty members endeavours transcend boundaries resulting in impactful publications in renowned journals and transformative solutions for real world problems
this department serves as testament to the expertise and achievements of our esteemed faculty members showcasing their remarkable contributions to the field of civil and infrastructure engineering
whether you aspire to delve into the depths of knowledge or seek innovative solutions to complex engineering challenges we invite you to embark on journey of exploration and discovery within our vibrant academic community
extend warm welcome to you as you embark on this enriching journey with us where boundless opportunities await to nurture your passion and drive for excellence in the department of civil and infrastructure engineering at iit jodhpur
vision indian institute of technology jodhpur future driven institute for nurturing excellence of thought creating preserving and imparting knowledge and using transformational technologies interventions with multidisciplinary approach for responding to societal challenges and aspirations mission foster humanitarian values passion for learning and creativity in faculty and students
move towards high quality futuristic educational and research ecosystem
develop socially responsible faculty students and future leaders committed to creating self reliant india
catalyze professional internal culture along with enabling infrastructure and ancillary services
forge effective national as well as international collaboration and partnership with industry and academia for diverse purposes and activities
about the department the rapidly urbanizing society and increasing quality of life demand reliable and intelligent infrastructure systems that cater to societal needs at different scales from the individual to the community level
consequently the civil and infrastructure industry has undergone profound changes and is constantly evolving
however the new age designs and innovations in the civil and infrastructure industry can only be driven by group of engineering graduates with multidisciplinary training and sound understanding of emerging technologies
the department of civil and infrastructure engineering iit jodhpur was established in january
the department offers unique programs that incorporate and integrate the elements of conventional civil engineering with advanced transformative technologies such as artificial intelligence ai cyber physical systems cps digital twins dt and automated management and information systems
additionally significant thrust is also planned on the design implementation and maintenance of large scale integrated infrastructure systems across different domains
department vision the department strives to be an internationally renowned centre of excellence in education research and innovation with major focus on sustainability and digitalization of infrastructure
the courses academic programs tech in civil and infrastructure engineeringundergraduate programs ph

faculty computer science engineering iit jodhpur
faculty welcome to faculty position the department of computer science and engineering at iit jodhpur invites applications for faculty positions at all levels
candidates should have phd degree in cse or related field
the candidates are expected to have excellent research track record and commitment towards teaching
while we encourage candidates from all areas of cse to apply special emphasis will be given to the following areas algorithms quantum computation information security database systems data engineering cloud technologies edge and fog computing computer graphics animation augmented and virtual reality data visualisation computer vision human machine interface information retrieval artificial intelligence and machine learning natural language understanding software systems and engineering programming languages and compilers social and complex networks autonomous systems high performance computing parallel programming gpu programming distributed systems os and networking 5g and 5g systems sensors and iot
about iit jodhpur iitj has sprawling campus of over acres with students and faculty members with the department of cse having faculty members
the department coordinates the btech mtech and mtech phd programs in cse and ai along with phd in cse
more details about the department can be found at
the institute also houses the technology and innovation hub on cv ar and vr
any indian national pio or foreign national is eligible to apply
the rules of government of india will be applicable for terms and conditions of the appointments
we offer salary and benefits as per the norms of the central government
benefits include relocation expenses maternity paternity leaves generous initiation grant phd student support on campus housing if available access to on campus medical facilities access to on campus sports facilities etc
in case of any clarification candidates may reach out to
interested candidates are encouraged to apply via
why choose iit jodhpur opportunity to work with diverse group of very talented faculty members in diverse areas of computer science
the department and the institute highly also encourage inter departmental collaboration
the department has high end computational facilities available in addition to the central facilities available with the institute
some of the departmental facilities include dgx multiple servers vanet lab and ar vr lab
the dgx2 server is high performance computing system designed specifically for artificial intelligence ai and deep learning applications
this server is equipped with nvidia tesla v100 gpus which provide massive parallel processing power and high bandwidth memory to support large scale machine learning models
it comes with nvlink technology which enables fast inter connectivity between gpus as well as high speed nvme storage system for efficient data processing
with these capabilities the dgx2 server can handle demanding ai workloads with ease making it an ideal resource for researchers and developers in the department
the department also has several high end workstations servers with nvidia a5000 and nvidia 1080ti designed for individual use
these workstations are equipped with powerful cpus high speed storage and advanced gpus making them suitable for range of computational tasks including data analysis machine learning and scientific computing
the department has several servers that are used for various purposes including web hosting database management and file storage
these servers are equipped with powerful cpus and storage making them suitable for handling large amounts of data and serving multiple users simultaneously

graduate attributes the graduates of the ug program in physics are expected to have the following attributes strong foundations of fundamental as well as applied concepts of physics enabling to excel in physics driven technologies
ability to acquire new knowledge of physics and integrate with engineering concepts to create new and innovative technologies for current and future applications
ability to apply critical scientific thinking and engineering skills to identify formulate and solve complex problems in applied areas blended with engineering practices
ability to apply principles of physics in the domain of energy materials and devices with focus on generation storage and management
ability to engage and actively participate in the upcoming areas of quantum information and related research domains of quantum technologies
preparedness to participate in future technological developments in photonics and optical communications beyond 5g including terahertz technology
ability to compete effectively in world of rapid technological advancements and assume leadership roles within academic industrial or entrepreneurial environments
aware of ethical issues societal needs and problems and conduct themselves as responsible professionals
learning outcomes the graduates of the ug program in physics will be able to acquire knowledge of fundamental and applied physics principles along with the required understanding of computing mathematics and engineering
to create select and apply appropriate techniques resources and fundamental physics tools to solve complex engineering problems with an understanding of the limitations through laboratory exercises and design projects
to apply the concepts of mathematics physics including quantum technologies and advanced computing tools to design complex engineering systems containing hardware and software including quantum algorithms modules
to acquire knowledge of fundamental and advanced concepts of photonics and terahertz technologies for communications devices towards medical applications sensing quantum technologies spectroscopy and imaging
to gain an in depth understanding of concepts of materials and devices for energy generation and storage integration of energy sub systems and next generation communications
to perform critical literature review and patent landscaping for innovative research
to understand professional ethics and social responsibilities
to develop technical presentation skills and communicate effectively
to develop an attitude for product design and entrepreneurial activities
projects and collaborations faqs bs program ques

no the specialization is available with the domains listed above only

bs students are allowed to participate in all placements options similar to other engineering branches
google apple amazon banking commerce etc or go for national labs drdo isro etc

and ph abroad and in india

tech first year the department is also actively engaged in teaching regular physics course viz
electromagnetism and optics phl1010 to tech
the department is also offering preparatory physics courses phl0010 and phl0020 at iit jodhpur catering to the requirements of the students of various iits
year students perform some interesting experiments in the physics laboratory course php1010
this course is of immense importance wherein the students are able to understand and appreciate that how the physical principles are important for various engineering disciplines and how they can be applied in various engineering problems
strong emphasis is given on two very important aspects viz
fundamental principles of physics for each of the experiments and ii proper recording of the observations and their documentation
additionally various compulsory and elective courses offered by the department are also open to tech
students as elective courses
from the large pool of courses relating to fundamental physics multidisciplinary science technology and engineering physics the students can register for the courses of their choice subject to fulfillment of necessary guidelines given in the academic regulations of the institute

indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur
about iit jodhpur indian institute of technology jodhpur was established in to foster technology education and research in india
the institute is committed to technological thought and action to benefit the economic development of india
scholarship in teaching and learning scholarship in research and creative accomplishments and relevance to industry are three driving forces for us at iit jodhpur
iit jodhpur functions from its sprawling residential permanent campus of acres on national highway north northwest of jodhpur towards nagaur
this campus is meticulously planned and envisioned to stand as symbol of academics simple but deep

student wellbeing committee iit jodhpur embark on journey to aasmaan the limitless sky with our wellbeing newsletter previous next mental health is state of mental well being that enables people to cope with the stresses of life realise their abilities learn well and work well and contribute to their community
mental health is basic human right
and it is crucial to personal community and socio economic development
world health organization
it is as important as physical health because both are connected through the body and its nervous system and are affected by environmental factors
just as one would reach out to doctor for physical ailment similarly one should not hesitate to contact professional counsellor for psychological problems
our motto the upcoming years of your stay at iit jodhpur will give your life new direction both academically and personally
as the time passes there will be various challenges waiting for you
we the student wellbeing committee is devoted to providing personal guidance and necessary resources to students to deal with all these challenges
the team tries to ensure that iitj is not just an institute but home away from home for you info important links faculty advisors counsellors team ug team pg team general queries discord server instagram telegram facebook phc contact no

winter school iit jodhpur
welcome to the winter school on ai and tcs the department of computer science and engineering and tih ihub drishti are jointly organizing the third winter school on artificial intelligence and theoretical computer science
the school is being organized as an in person event
this year the school will be focused on generative ai december computation in social choice and economics december students who successfully complete the winter school and obtain participation certificate will be prioritized for summer winter internship at the department of computer science and engineering iit jodhpur under the mentorship of dr pallavi jain or dr pratik mazumder and or dr anand mishra
