rules and regulations for tech sc _project back to index allotment of students to supervisors will be made based on the preferences of the students and supervisor
the supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the first semester
program would advise until the student is assigned to regular supervisor
each semester letter grade will be awarded after examination by committee consisting of drc supervisor and two members conversant with the field of research with at least one member external to the department maybe outside the institute also
drc will appoint examiners in consultation with the supervisor
the same committee may examine more than one thesis
external member can be on vc
drc will ensure that award of letter grade would be as per relative grading policy
regular full time student must register for tech project part in the summer semester following nd semester
he must obtain satisfactory grade to continue tech project part in the next semester
his performance in the summer semester will be evaluated by his supervisor
rules and regulations for ph tech ph dual degree program back to index thesis supervisor back to index selection of ph
candidates the selection should be based on merit and capability of the candidate to conduct research
there should at least be faculty member available or likely to join in the areas of interest of the candidate at the time of selection
appointment of thesis supervisor ph
students shall be admitted in the department and no supervisor shall be assigned at the time of selection
allotment of students to supervisor will be made based on the preferences of the students and supervisor
for both ph
dual degree supervisor and area identification must be completed by the end of the first semester the convener drc department research committee coordinator interdisciplinary research program would advise until the student is assigned to regular supervisor
there shall not be more than two supervisors in general for student
additional supervisor can be allowed with the approval of chairman senate
supervisor from outside the institute before the qualifier may be appointed on the request of student supervisor with the recommendation of the drc irc and the dean academics and approval of the chairman senate
the external supervisor will be requested to sign intellectual property right ipr and non disclosure agreement nda documents as part of acceptance
from the financial point of view the institute will have no obligation to the external supervisor
caretaker supervisor additional supervisor whenever the supervisor proceeds on short leave for period up to one year the drc irc interdisciplinary research committee shall appoint caretaker supervisor in consultation with the supervisor and the student to take care of the administrative requirements
whenever the supervisor proceeds on long leave for period more than year then an additional supervisor needs to be appointed on the suggestion of the supervisor the supervisor going on lien or sabbatical may continue supervising students and the supervisor can opt for either an additional supervisor or caretaker supervisor
the supervisor on his her retirement or on resignation may continue as supervisor and will have to opt for an additional supervisor provided the student has cleared qualifier before the supervisor retirement resignation
composition of departmental research committee drc the drc will consist of coordinators of tech tech ph dual degree and ph programs of the department head of the department and senior professor associate professor proposed by the head
the drc will be chaired by professor associate professor nominated by head of the department
the chairman of the drc will be member of the academic committee
the drc has to be approved by dean academics
ph program coordinator will be the convenor of drc and will be proposed by the head
the tenure for the drc will be years
composition of interdisciplinary research committee irc the irc will consist of all coordinators of idrps and senior professor associate professor as the chairman of the irc will be nominated by dean academics
the chairman of irc will be member of ac
one of the idrp co ordinators would be convenor of the committee
the tenure for the irc will be years
the irc will be approved by the dean academics
change of research supervisor back to index change of supervisor under exceptional circumstances shall be permitted by dean academics on the recommendation of the drc irc after obtaining the consent of the student ii the present supervisor and iii the proposed supervisor
if required realignment of student research program will happen under the supervision of the drc irc
student research committee src back to index composition of src the src will normally consist of supervisor and three other faculty members conversant with the field of research with at least one member external to the department maybe outside the institute also
student research committee src for the candidate shall be proposed by the supervisor recommended by the drc irc and approved by dean academics
the src shall have one member identified as chairman for administrative functions and the supervisor will act as convener
chairman src is to be appointed by dean academics
the appointment of src should be completed by the end of the first semester
any subsequent changes in the composition of src shall be communicated through the drc irc to dean academics for record chairman and supervisor shall be the internal examiners for the evaluation of the thesis
the src is expected to monitor the progress of the candidate until the completion of the program
annual progress monitoring meeting apm back to index the academic progress of all registered ph students will be reviewed once in year by the src and peers in the institute
the review will be based upon annual progress report and ii poster presentation open to all
src will award satisfactory non satisfactory grade based upon and ii
two consecutive non satisfactory grades will lead to termination of registration
for implementational convenience academic calendar must indicate two days in year for conducting annual progress evaluation of research scholars
following the groupings of students and scheduling guidelines are suggested
for students joining in 1st semester of ay during 1st july to 30th september of the year
for students joining in 2nd semester of ay during 1st december to 28th february of the year
the first apm will be conducted after the successful completion of qualifier requirements
each semester satisfactory progress or unsatisfactory progress will be reported by the supervisor through the src for record
any situation in exception to the above will be processed by the academic committee and approved by dean academics qualifier requirements of ph student back to index the following four components together will constitute qualifier candidacy requirements for ph
student and for ph
candidate to be eligible for the enhanced srf fellowship
completed course requirements with the minimum cgpa specified in section
cleared comprehensive examination
successful presentation on state of the art of the chosen field of research
successful presentation and defense of research proposal the ph
students are normally expected to complete successfully the qualifier requirements before the beginning of the fifth semester of his her registration in the ph
program and in any case not later than the beginning of the sixth semester after their registration in the ph
part time candidates will need to complete the qualifier requirement before the beginning of the seventh semester
comprehensive examination of ph
tech ph student the comprehensive examination must be designed to test the general capability of the student and the breadth of his her knowledge in the discipline and areas related to the field of research
the comprehensive examination shall be conducted by comprehensive examination committee of the department idrp
the comprehensive examination will consist of written test with three papers
departments will offer at least papers for conducting comprehensive examination
each paper will have broad coverage of one essential sub area of the department
the course content of these papers will be approved by the academic committee and the senate
the syllabus of papers for the comprehensive examination will not be the same as courses offered by the department it must be designed to test the breadth of the knowledge in that area
the src will specify set three papers as comprehensive requirement for particular student
these three papers may be selected from across the departments
the comprehensive examination requirements shall be intimated to the ph student within two weeks of src formation
all comprehensive examinations will be scheduled on two fixed days in year
it can coincide with the annual progress evaluation day of doctoral candidates
students may decide to appear for three papers on the same day or on different days
student can appear in the comprehensive examination before he she has completed the course requirements and satisfied the minimum specified cgpa requirement
if the performance of the ph student in comprehensive examination paper in the first attempt is not satisfactory he she will be given one more opportunity to appear within six months of the first attempt
for clearing of the comprehensive examination student must perform satisfactorily in all papers
comprehensive examination to be completed by the students ph within semesters direct ph and mtech phd dual degree within semesters state of art seminar sota every ph student is required to give general seminar in the department covering the state of art of the area of research
the presentation must also include patent landscaping of the area
the presentation will be evaluated by the src
candidate must have satisfactory grade in sota awarded by src for becoming eligible to present his research proposal
research proposal research proposal report presentation will be evaluated by src after successful completion of sota
the research proposal must include representative research work equivalent to research work worth credits
src will allocate letter grade based on the performance of the candidate
candidacy for the ph
degree back to index student enrolled in the ph program is formally admitted to the candidacy for the ph degree after he she has completed the qualifier requirements for the degree
only such students who are admitted to the candidacy will be allowed to submit ph thesis
relaxation in tech
ph dual degree program back to index tech ph dual degree students who have successfully completed all qualifier requirements under exceptional conditions as approved by src after years can also convert into part time external ph student and exit with tech degree if all conditions for part time external conversion are satisfied
the renewal of their registration for every semester however will be considered only if src finds their progress to be satisfactory and recommends the continuance of registration
cancellation of registration back to index the registration of student whose progress is not found to be satisfactory by the src or who has not enrolled will be liable for cancellation
the registration of student who has not submitted his her thesis before the end of the maximum permissible period specified in section will be liable for cancellation
synopsis back to index synopsis will consist of an open seminar and comprehensive internal closed door assessment of the research work through pre synopsis report by src the student can submit the synopsis only if the src is satisfied with the quality and quantity of the work for submission as ph thesis
publications arising out of the thesis are to be submitted along with the pre synopsis report students should submit the synopsis and thesis within six months of the open seminar date
if required an extension of three months may be permitted by dean academics on the recommendation of src
if the synopsis and thesis are not submitted in the specified period the student will be asked to present the synopsis again
on satisfactory completion of the prescribed courses with minimum cgpa specified in the comprehensive examination the sota the research work and the synopsis the student shall submit the requisite copies of the synopsis of his her research work in the required format through the supervisor and hod to the academic section for consideration of the src
the student should have at least one paper either published or accepted for publication in refereed journal refereed conference src members are required to certify the quality of journals conference
thesis submission and evaluation back to index the supervisor shall propose list of examiners consisting of at least four faculty members from abroad and faculty members from india who have the expertise in the area in which the student undertook research
for selecting an examiner the following guidelines should be followed the examiners shall have at least years of post ph experience no two proposed examiners shall be from the same organization and the examiners can be faculty members or scientists of standing and repute
chairman senate may ask for additional names for examiners
the chairman senate shall select minimum two examiners from the proposed list of which at least one should be an examiner from outside india
the consent of these examiners shall be taken before sending the thesis to them
in addition src and supervisor shall be the examiners of the thesis
the viva voce will be conducted in the presence of src supervisor and the external examiner
one of the external examiners shall attend the thesis defense
the examiners shall submit written report on the thesis within period of two months from the date of receipt of the thesis
if both examiners declare the thesis as acceptable for award of ph degree the dean academics shall request the supervisor to hold the thesis defense by the student
if any of the examiners reject the thesis for the award of the ph degree the dean academics shall report the matter to the chairman senate for further consideration
the chairman senate will refer the thesis to third examiner under special circumstances else the registration of the student shall stand cancelled in the ph program
if both examiners reject the thesis for the award of the ph degree no degree shall be awarded by the institute and the registration of the student shall stand cancelled in the ph program
if an examiner suggests revision of the thesis the student shall resubmit the thesis after the revision within prescribed time period of months in consultation with the supervisor
when both examiners recommend the thesis as accepted for the student to defend the thesis or after the resubmission of the thesis after incorporating the suggestions corrections given by the examiners the student shall publicly present the thesis and defend the contention of the thesis
the committee consisting of chairman src supervisor the examiner from within india and other faculty members quorum would be chairman src supervisor and an external examiner who participated in the comprehensive examination of the student shall evaluate the thesis defense of the ph student also
on their recommendation dean academics shall recommend to senate to consider the award of ph degree to the student
graduation requirements back to index student is deemed to have completed the requirements for graduation if she he has met the requirements laid down in clauses to below
minimum residential requirement back to index table minimum residential requirement no

the degree can be awarded only after the bog accords its approval

letter grade grade points comment exceptional outstanding excellent very good good average below average marginal poor fail incomplete satisfactory in course thesis continuation unsatisfactory withdrawn
grades description grade has the same grade point as grade
the grade indicates exceptional performance and is awarded only in the course in which the number of registered students is more than
it should not exceed of the total strength of the particular theory or lab course
the grade is not awarded for projects seminars
grade will be awarded to student who has scored marks less than the cutoff marks for grade and has met the attendance criterion of the institute
students who obtain an grade will be eligible to appear in an additional examination
if they perform satisfactorily they become eligible for getting the grade converted to grade otherwise they will continue to have grade
the student will have only one chance to appear for the additional examination for an grade
the additional examination will be conducted within the first week of the next semester
the date of additional examination of institute core courses for undergraduate students centrally notified while for all other courses the date would be announced by the respective course coordinators
student can appear for maximum of three such additional tests in given semester
if student can not appear for the test due to any reason he she will not get any additional chance
if student with grade in course does not pass the course through the additional test or obtains an grade in the course he she has to repeat the course if it is core course
in case the course is an elective the student may take the same course again or any other course
and grades are not counted in the calculation of the cgpa however these are taken into account in the calculation of the sgpa
an grade is temporarily awarded to student on his her request to denote incomplete performance in course on approval of instructor
an grade is awarded in case missing an evaluation component due to absence on medical grounds or other special circumstances
requests for grade should be made at the earliest but not later than the last day of major tests
all evaluation requirements for such students in the corresponding course should be completed before the end of the first week of the next semester
upon completion of all course requirements the grade is converted to regular grade
this grade is awarded to student with satisfactory performance in non graded and audit courses
if the stipulated requirements are not fulfilled the unsatisfactory grade is awarded
the grades obtained in an audit course are not considered in the calculation of sgpa or cgpa
this grade is awarded to student with satisfactory performance in thesis for continuation this grade is awarded to student with unsatisfactory performance in thesis audit or non graded courses
this grade is awarded to student who has opted to withdraw from course
withdrawal from course is permitted until the date specified in the academics calendar

grad cohort workshop iit jodhpur
welcome to the acm india grad cohort workshop since the cra wp has been organizing the grad cohort workshop in the usa for women in computing to help them through their graduate years and beyond
starting grad cohort workshops for indian women are being conducted by acm india
these workshops aim to reach out to indian women graduate students in the field of computing facilitating interactions between eminent female researchers in the field from academia and industry and current students
here through sharing some of their own experiences women experts guide students towards productive graduate tenure
some questions that are likely to be discussed are how to choose mentor choice of research areas and questions challenges and perseverance honing one skills scientific writing and presentation work life balance spirit of collaboration applying for postdocs jobs career options and much more
in the acm india grad cohort workshop is being organized in the online mode by iit jodhpur
applicants can look forward to presentations on host of research areas mentoring brainstorming sessions networking opportunities and lots more
important dates registration deadline july workshop july eligibility masters and ph women students at indian universities or institutes

faculty members chemistry iit jodhpur
faculty members specialization for positions in department of chemistry applications are invited from indian and foreign nationals with exceptional academic record relevant teaching experience excellent research record and valuable industrial experience for contractual and full time positions of professor associate professor and assistant professor in the department of chemistry to carry out teaching learning and research in the following fields bioorganic and bioinorganic chemistry inorganic chemistry organic polymer chemistry and physical chemistry experimental
the department also welcomes applicants with background in other relevant fields of chemistry
applicant should preferably have undergraduate degree in chemistry from reputed institute or university along with good academic record throughout from class
the institute is building extensive laboratory facilities with many advanced state of the art equipment to undertake research and development
further the department encourages faculty members to interact with the industry and national laboratories to conduct collaborative research and development in nationally relevant areas
the department offers masters and doctoral degree programs in chemistry
faculty members are also required to teach courses in various undergraduate and masters degree programmes of the institute

health center iit jodhpur
welcome to the health center iit jodhpur the health centre hc has been started at the permanent campus of iit jodhpur from june
iit jodhpur provides round the clock health care facilities to students faculty staff members and their dependents also other residents and working staff of the institute
this fully equipped and self sufficient facility is run under the supervision of professor in charge health center pic hc and medical officers mo with advice provided by the medical service user committee msuc
presently the following facilities are available at the health centre hc medical officers regular visits of specialist doctors psychiatrist gynae ologist paediatrician ent medicine orthopaedician nursing officers male female x7 diagnostic laboratory physiotherapy unit in house pharmacy x7 emergency room and daycare room separate male and female wards and isolation rooms acls advanced cardiac life support ambulance and bls basic life support ambulance ayurvedic homeopathic and naturopathic and other consultants visit twice week
hospital tie ups and medical support network in addition to on campus healthcare iit jodhpur has established formal agreements with several leading hospitals to ensure priority treatment for its students faculty staff and their registered dependents
these include goyal hospital and research centre medipulse hospital asg eye hospital vasundhara hospital and aiims jodhpur
the institute health center hc plays central role in coordinating and supervising the treatment of patients admitted to these empanelled hospitals
this ensures continuity of care and assistance during hospitalization
extension of medical services visitors to the institute may access basic healthcare services through the health center during their stay on campus upon request
in emergency situations medical services are extended to non iit jodhpur community members residing in the campus area to provide timely first aid and support
arrangements are routinely made for specialist doctor visits on the campus psychiatrist gynaecologist paediatrician ent specialists endocrinologist orthopedic specialist on weekly basis
the health center also organizes various health awareness medical screening vaccination camps and blood donation camps in coordination with hospitals and other agencies
the health center is the first point of contact for any medical needs and it aims to cater provide primary health care to the students staff faculties and their dependent in the campus
medical officers on campus the following institute medical officers are available on campus in rotating shifts ensuring medical coverage for the iitj community dr anukriti kumari dr bhuvnesh kumar dr gaurav kumar viswas dr hemant joshi dr neha sharma dr prashant sankhla these officers are committed to addressing the general healthcare needs of students staff and faculty at any time of day
access to sexual and reproductive healthcare sexual and reproductive health services including education and counselling are provided by the visiting gynaecologists and medical officers
these services are essential to supporting the overall well being and awareness of the campus community
visiting physicians and specialists one md physician is available daily except sundays from pm to pm at the health center
specialist doctors from various disciplines visit the hc weekly including psychiatry gynaecology paediatrics ent internal medicine orthopaedics note prior information regarding specialist visits is communicated via official email notifications
rate list cghs rate list download file kb ayurvedic medicine list download file kb results adv
iitj rd phc doad staff nurse on project kb adv
iitj rd phc doad physiotherapist on project kb shortlisting status adv

office of director iit jodhpur
welcome to the office of director the office of the director at the indian institute of technology jodhpur is the central hub of leadership and governance responsible for steering the institute towards its mission of excellence in education research and innovation
our mission is to uphold and enhance the institute core values ensuring the highest standards of academic and operational integrity
the director provides visionary leadership setting strategic priorities and fostering culture of continuous improvement and academic rigor
our office oversees the implementation of policies strategic planning and resource allocation to ensure that iit jodhpur remains at the forefront of technological and scientific advancement
we work closely with faculty staff students and external stakeholders to promote collaborative and inclusive environment
key initiatives include advancing interdisciplinary research expanding global partnerships and enhancing the overall student experience through comprehensive support services and state of the art facilities
the office of the director is dedicated to fostering innovation and entrepreneurship supporting initiatives that translate research into real world applications and societal benefits
we also prioritize sustainability and social responsibility integrating these principles into the institute strategic framework
our commitment to excellence is reflected in our continuous efforts to attract and retain outstanding talent provide cutting edge infrastructure and cultivate vibrant intellectual community
director of iit jodhpur professor avinash kumar agarwal took over the charge of director iit jodhpur on may
he obtained his undergraduate degree in mechanical engineering from malviya regional engineering college jaipur and his mtech energy and phd energy from the indian institute of technology iit delhi
after his post doctoral fellowship at the erc uw madison usa he returned to india in and joined iit kanpur
he was visiting professor at the university of loughborough uk photonics institute university of vienna austria hanyang university and kaist south korea
prof agarwal is interested in research in ic engines combustion conventional and alternative fuels methanol dme hydrogen hcng fuelled engine development lca and tco analyses fuel sprays lubricating oil tribology optical diagnostics laser ignition hcci particulates and emission control and large bore engines
he has developed laser fired hydrogen and cng engines in automotive sizes and developed the first electronic fuel injection system equipped with locomotive engine for indian railways
currently prof agarwal is developing methanol and dme fuelled engines vehicles for the automotive agricultural sectors

annexure regulations for iit jodhpur aiims jodhpur joint programs masters phd dual degree and phd in medical technologies indian institute of technology jodhpur all india institute of medical sciences jodhpur appointment of supervisor any faculty member at aiims iit jodhpur holding fulltime position can be designated as supervisor
faculty members of iit and aiims can supervise ph students as per the regulations of respective institute
the faculty member who himself herself is registered for ph programme will not be eligible for the supervision of ph there will be at least one supervisor each from both aiims jodhpur and iit jodhpur
maximum of three supervisors are allowed
external supervisor with at least two years of post graduate teaching experience years post phd research experience as medical non medical researcher scientist faculty member may be appointed as supervisor provided he she has original significant research contribution in the field
qualifier requirement and plan for thesis work for the dual degree step after 1st semester the candidate as to identify the need from immersion problem definition emphasizing scope for innovation and development step after 4th semester and by 5th semester sota seminar detailed presentation on scientific challenges and innovation model of the identifie problem step after 6th semester and by 7th semester present translation agenda and or business plan step after 7th semester to take call while presenting whether to opt for degree with translational component product development or opt for incubation with business plan for ph degree step after 1st semester the candidate has to identify the need from immersion problem definition emphasizing scope for innovation and development step by end of 2nd semester present foundation of the identified problem of product development step by end of 3rd semester present sota seminar step by end of 4th semester present complete plan for translation prototyping the device step by end of 7th semester to take call while presenting whether to opt for degree with translational component product development or opt for incubation with business plan assessment of the work of the candidates annual progress work during the thesis work shall be assessed by the doctoral committee and report will be submitted to the dean through the supervisor
the doctoral committee will be formed after 1st semester and before end of second semester thesis and examination the thesis will be submitted after an open seminar presented by the candidate and the approval of the doctoral committee
at least two patents or equivalent ip right document filed is essential for submitting the thesis
each candidate shall submit four print copies and pdf format of the thesis duly certified by the supervisor and the co supervisor for evaluation after completion of the required period
panel of examiners shall be submitted before the expected date of submission of the thesis by he supervisor in consultation with the doctoral committee
the panel shall include eight examiners who are experts in the field of the study undertaken by the candidate three of these shall be from abroad
the supervisors may go for the consent of the examiners before proposing the names in the examiner list
in the thesis evaluation form the points of judgment of the thesis can be the novelty contribution of the product development translation after approval of thesis by the external and the internal examiners the viva voce examination will be held to adjudge the proficiency of the candidate in the subject allied to the candidate field of work
if the thesis is rejected by more than one examiner it will stand rejected and shall not be referred to any other examiner
however in the event the thesis is rejected by only one examiner it will be referred to another examiner from among the approved panel
in case the thesis is approved by this examiner it will be considered as unanimously approved lse the respective chairman senate may advise course of action
if one or more examiner recommends re submission modification of thesis the same shall be done within maximum period of six months from the date of intimation to the candidate
if the report from all the external examiners is not received within three months copy of thesis will be sent to another examiner from amongst the approved panel
the thesis defense will be conducted in the presence of doctoral committee and one of the external examiners who has examined the thesis
credit requirements for the ph degree candidates enrolled in phd other than through master programme compulsory courses of mast er programme elective credits thesis candidates through master programme elective credits thesis result if the examiners are not satisfied with the performance of the candidate in the above examination the candidate will have to reap pear for another viva vice examination after period of two months provided such specific recommendation is made by the board of examiners
the candidate shall be declared eligible for the award of the degree of doctor of philosophy only on the unanimous recommendations of the members of the board of examiners at the viva voce examinatio award of degree the transcript will be issued by the institute in which the candidate will be registered
the degree will be awarded jointly by aiims jodhpur and iit jodhpur in alternate convocations
the degree certificate will be issued and signed by competent authorit ies from both the institutes
empowering the next generation of researchers
on january iit jodhpur in collaboration with the american chemical society acs hosted navigating phd and beyond dynamic event designed to equip young researchers with the essential skills perspectives and strategies to excel in academia nd industry
the event featured insightful sessions by distinguished experts including prof avinash kumar agarwal director iit jodhpur prof ashutosh sharma scholar in residence and president insa dr deeksha gupta acs dr anand madhukar teri sas and dr ajay jha acs
key takeaways importance of sustainability in research mastering the art of scientific communication navigating career pathways making the most of phd day filled with knowledge sharing networking and inspiration this event reaffirmed the commitment to fostering robust research ecosystem

project staff members physics iit jodhpur
project staff members number of sponsored research projects are being run by faculty members of the department of physics
technical support is required to effectively meet the technical objectives of the project
towards this end temporary positions are available for young scientists and technicians to seek training and engagement with advanced subjects of the ongoing research projects
interested persons are invited to apply online for these temporary positions important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations web policy web information manager feedback cert in help nirf internal committee intranet links copyright all rights reserved this portal is owned designed and developed by digital infrastructure automation iit jodhpur

our alumni mathematics iit jodhpur
our alumni we are very keen to keep in touch with our alumni and would like to open heartedly welcome our alumni to keep in touch with us as well
we would like to request our alumni to contact connect us via facebook twitter and linkedin to share your latest information and your achievements we will be glad to showcase them on our website and other digital platforms
also your are requested to register yourself at the official alumni portal of iit jodhpur to be in close touch with your alma mater

grad cohort workshop iit jodhpur
welcome to the acm india grad cohort workshop since the cra wp has been organizing the grad cohort workshop in the usa for women in computing to help them through their graduate years and beyond
starting grad cohort workshops for indian women are being conducted by acm india
these workshops aim to reach out to indian women graduate students in the field of computing facilitating interactions between eminent female researchers in the field from academia and industry and current students
here through sharing some of their own experiences women experts guide students towards productive graduate tenure
some questions that are likely to be discussed are how to choose mentor choice of research areas and questions challenges and perseverance honing one skills scientific writing and presentation work life balance spirit of collaboration applying for postdocs jobs career options and much more
in the acm india grad cohort workshop is being organized in the online mode by iit jodhpur
applicants can look forward to presentations on host of research areas mentoring brainstorming sessions networking opportunities and lots more
important dates registration deadline july workshop july eligibility masters and ph women students at indian universities or institutes
organizing committee from acm chitra babu heena timani lipika dey neeldhara misra from iitj pallavi jain richa singh romi banerjee organizers important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations web policy web information manager feedback cert in help nirf internal committee intranet links copyright all rights reserved this portal is owned designed and developed by digital infrastructure automation iit jodhpur

project staff members bioscience bioengineering iit jodhpur
project staff members number of sponsored research projects are being run by faculty members of the department of bioscience bioengineering
technical support is required to effectively meet the technical objectives of the project
towards this end temporary positions may become available periodically for young scientists and technicians to seek training and engagement with advanced subjects of the ongoing research projects
interested persons are invited to apply online for these temporary positions against the advertisement when announced

seminars and meetings physics iit jodhpur
seminars and meetings diving deep into physics seminar series quantum superposition entanglement and applications by prof natthi lal sharma eastern michigan university usa on feb from pm ist title of the talk quantum superposition entanglement and applications speaker prof natthi lal sharma eastern michigan university usa when
feb from ist where
kothari seminar hall department of physics
abstract quantum superposition of single and many particle states is the heart and soul of quantum mechanics
first examples of superposition of single particle quantum states from chemistry to particle physics along with some visual analogs will be presented
superposition of product states of two or more particles into single non separable entity is called entanglement
in two particle entangled state the individuality of each is lost and measuring the state of one particle instantaneously fixes the state of the other irrespective of separation between them nonlocality
this makes quantum computing super fast and quantum teleportation possible without violating no cloning theorem
any attempt by spy agency to intercept quantum key in cryptography protocol becomes detectable by bell test
atom computing qubit computer quantum encrypted video conference over micius satellite between china and austria in and open air quantum teleportation over km in the canary islands are latest achievements based on entanglement
after first quantum revolution brought by transistors and lasers we are entering second quantum revolution by manipulating systems of entangled particles
storage of information in quantum bits qubits its processing transfer and sensing has created new field of quantum information science
about the speaker prof natthi lal sharma is presently associated with eastern michigan university as an emeritus professor
his research interests include many body green functions the quantum langevin equation electrodynamics optics quantum entanglement and bell inequality among others
all are welcome

seminars and meetings physics iit jodhpur
seminars and meetings diving deep into physics colloquium series 6m dot and energetic cosmic transients by dr shashi bhushan pandey anusandhan national research foundation anrf new delhi india on dec at pm title of the talk 6m dot and energetic cosmic transients speaker dr shashi bhushan pandey anusandhan national research foundation anrf new delhi india
dec from ist where
kothari seminar hall department of physics
abstract modern and active optics based 6m devasthal optical telescope dot and backend instruments are well suited to study time critical astronomical events both at galactic and extra galactic scales
longitudinal advantage of the facility is highly crucial to add values towards study of cosmic energetic phenomenon like supernovae sne and afterglows of gamma ray bursts grbs
during last three decades grbs as very energetic and enigmatic sources are extremely important to not only understand extreme physical mechanisms but also to shed light to understand evolution of massive stars and in turn nature of compact objects
optical nir studies of host galaxies of such sites further helps to understand ambient environment and star formation history at larger distances
recent observational knowledge at multi wavelengths about grbs and other transients have opened up some of the key areas having long term implications under larger umbrella of time domain astronomy
all are welcome

undergraduate programs computer science engineering iit jodhpur
undergraduate programs tech
computer science and engineering cse the tech
program in computer science and engineering cse at iit jodhpur aims to equip its students with skills to undertake careers that involve identifying and engineering solutions for real world problems through innovating upon their core competence in computer science
the curriculum gives due importance to the foundational aspects of computer science as well as aspires to inculcate in students the foresight and expertise to address transdisciplinary technological questions
students can choose from number of elective courses that strive to expand their understanding of emerging concepts and processes across domains such as theory and algorithms hardware systems network and security artificial intelligence machine learning speech vision language and social computing
the program also encourages its students to opt from number of exclusive interdisciplinary specialization tracks that are envisaged to provide coherent and sophisticated understanding of underlying subject areas to empower them to pursue myriad career paths
some of these specializations are visual computing socio digital reality advanced algorithms social and sustainable computing intelligent communication and networking vlsi systems the program aspires to produce well prepared motivated workforce who would valiantly embark upon careers in research and industry involving innovation knowledge creation engineering and entrepreneurship
all students who have graduated from the department thus far are currently placed in companies of repute or are pursuing higher education in top tier universities in the country and the rest of the world
detailed curriculum for tech
cse download file kb details of courses offered by dept
cse download file kb specializations download file kb regulations for undergraduate programs download file kb tech
artificial intelligence and data science ai ds starting iit jodhpur will be offering unique undergraduate program in artificial intelligence and data science that envisions to equip students with the ability to assess societal health safety legal and cultural issues and most importantly identify their consequent responsibilities as engineers of effective solutions for the same
the curriculum is interdisciplinary at heart straddling computer science mathematics artificial intelligence machine learning data science and their applications across numerous domains
besides artificial intelligence deep learning digital image processing computer vision and video processing the program will be training its students in range of exclusive courses like biometrics dependable ai resource constrained ai big data data engineering and data visualization stream analytics social network analysis human machine interaction augmented and virtual reality speech and natural language understanding computational neuroscience the curriculum promises to provide opportunities to its students to explore number of transdisciplinary specialization areas including visual computing socio digital reality intelligent communications and networking language technologies robotics and aiot
the program will also allow its students to venture into one of kind management specialization that would focus on ai and technology leading to an mba btech mba dual degree program and scope for entrepreneurial pursuits detailed curriculum for tech

research highlights chemistry iit jodhpur
research highlights bench stable low valent chromium catalysts for hydrogenation of co2 bicarbonate and inorganic carbonates to formate
singh gutal regina banerjee paranjothy chakraborty acs catal
doi acscatal 4c04492 catalytic hydrogenation of the potent greenhouse gas carbon dioxide to obtain value added products represents much sought after methodology in academia and industry
hydrogenation of co2 to formic acid catalyzed by molecular complexes is highly desirable protocol because of the industrial importance of formic acid and its potential application as renewable hydrogen storage material
herein we disclose that the bench stable low valent phosphine tethered chromium carbonyl complex cr dppp co dppp bis diphenylphosphino propane catalyzed efficient hydrogenation of co2 to formate giving maximum turnover number ton of at in thf h2o mixture after at the expense of bar co2 h2 pressure
biologically relevant sodium bicarbonate and inorganic carbonates were also tested for hydrogenation to sodium formate furnishing decent yields of the desired products
mechanistic investigation along with theoretical studies revealed that the reaction proceeded via the formation of metallacarboxylate intermediate which was further converted to formato complex via an anionic hydrido carbonyl intermediate

research highlights civil and infrastructure engineering iit jodhpur
research highlights congratulation to prof subhasish dey for publishing research paper titled hydrodynamics of turbulent flow in channels with submerged flexible vegetation canopy in physics of fluid volume issue abstract this paper describes the results of flume experimental campaign exploring the flow structure and turbulence characteristics in open channel flows with submerged flexible vegetation called ceratophyllum demersum also commonly known as rigid hornwort
the analysis allows us to formulate the distributions of time averaged streamwise velocity reynolds shear stresses and turbulent kinetic energy tke in the fully developed flow under the influence of three different submerged vegetation densities
method for calculating the manning roughness coefficient in open channels with submerged flexible vegetation is proposed and an empirical formula for the drag coefficient of submerged flexible vegetation is derived
the distribution of the eddy viscosity and the canopy top penetration depth are examined under the influence of submerged flexible vegetation
tke model is derived for open channel flows with submerged flexible vegetation considering the turbulence length scale ranging from to the model is then validated using the experimental data
the sensitivity of the turbulence model to the two key parameters eddy penetration depth and turbulent length scale is analyzed
this study provides an improved understanding and insights into the effects of the submerged flexible vegetation on the flow structure and turbulence characteristics

doctoral programs computer science engineering iit jodhpur
doctoral programs tech ph dual degree cse tech ph dual degree ai iit jodhpur has been offering mtech phd dual degree programs since july
these programs have been designed particularly for students with an inclination for research
students who have completed their tech
are eligible to join this program
students complete their tech
course work and then start their research and earn both tech
and ph degrees at the end of the program
there are two distinct aspects of these programs first it provides an avenue for students to earn both degrees in far lesser duration compared to if these were done individually and second students are awarded fellowship equivalent to that of jrf from the date of their joining
academically these programs facilitate students to decide upon their area of research by the end of the first semester
after phase of rigorous coursework in the first two years they start working towards the academic requirements of phd that includes comprehensive exam state of the art seminar publications in top conferences and journals and thesis
the students can also work on industry projects and collaborate with faculty from other academic research bodies
this program offers the benefit of phd level scholarship from the first year itself and the integrated courses and research helps in reducing the overall time of completing mtech and phd
the department of cse is currently offering two such programs mtech phd dual degree in cse and mtech phd dual degree in ai and is continuously looking for motivated and capable students to conduct advanced research in all areas of computer science and ai please visit the research page for more details
the coursework requirements of these programs are similar to the corresponding mtech programs and other support travel support institute mobility grant fellowship schemes in addition to that from the ministry of education etc
and research related academic requirements are similar to the phd program
revised curriculum for dual degree download file kb ay onwards detailed curriculum for tech ph dual degree cse download file kb detailed curriculum for tech ph dual degree ai download file kb detailed curriculum for tech ph dual degree cse download file kb ay onwards detailed curriculum for tech ph dual degree ai download file kb ay onwards details of courses offered by dept
cse download file kb regulations for postgraduate programs download file kb ph cse the ph program at the department of computer science and engineering cse at iit jodhpur is postgraduate research oriented
ph student works in an area of his her interest under the supervision of faculty member and also has the flexibility to have an industry expert as co supervisor
the student has to complete the ph qualifier requirements which involve minimum number of credits by taking courses comprehensive exam state of the art seminar and research proposal defense
the doctoral program salient feature is the independent research work taken by scholars leading to thesis at the end of the program
the average duration of phd
program is between four to five years
the cse department invites students with research bent of mind to apply for admission to the ph program
the ph applicant must have high aspiration and willingness to work on socially relevant cutting edge problems
the department expects that an aspirant has strong foundations in core computer science subjects
the department offers admission to the ph program in categories like full time part time
tracks moe funded ph ph

university in prague iit roorkee regulations for doctoral programs download file kb details of courses offered by the department cse download file kb apply for admission details of comprehensive papers download file kb joint ph jpd with suny buffalo ub requirements students interested in being admitted into the jpd need to be first selected into the full time phd program in cse at either institution as per selection procedures of that institution
jpd selection procedures will be initiated within months of the student enrolling in the phd program
students selected into the jpd program shall be enrolled on full time basis at both institutions
before the student matriculates to ub as part of the residency requirement the student must fulfill ub minimum academic admission conditions ub required minimum score in english for language proficiency requirements
toefl ielts pte cpe cae or det gate or equivalent as specified by moe govt
of india from india is mandatory
while the program specifically admits exceptional students following their completion of an appropriate bachelor degree it will also admit those who will have completed an appropriate master degree
features dissertation will be jointly directed by faculty from both institutions students will be awarded two separate phd degrees one from each institution students will need to spend approximately equal time at each institution when in residence at ub scholarship will cover tuition costs and living allowance stipend when in residence at iitj scholarship will be at par with phd students at iitj when enrolled as full time phd student at ub all broad based fees will be waived off
covered fees include comprehensive fee academic excellence and success fee student activity fee and international student fee wherever applicable students will have access to funding for research costs from the laboratory where research is being conducted important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations web policy web information manager feedback cert in help nirf internal committee intranet links copyright all rights reserved this portal is owned designed and developed by digital infrastructure automation iit jodhpur

chairman bog indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur
chairman bog chairman board of governors shri kiran kumar shri kiran kumar is the chairman of the physical research laboratory management council and member of the space commission government of india
he served as secretary department of space and chairman indian space research organisation isro during
born on october in hassan karnataka shri kiran kumar holds an sc
degree in physics electronics from bangalore university and an tech
degree in physical engineering from the indian institute of science bangalore
he has steered the implementation of the applications oriented indian space programme which has facilitated rapid development of the country in several important spheres including earth observation communication navigation meteorology and space science as well as the development of indigenous launch vehicles and related technologies to ensure assured access to space
he has led the design and development of more than electro optical imaging sensors flown on various spaceborne platforms starting from bhaskara in
his role in the success of the chandrayaan mission and the mars orbiter mission has also been significant
shri kiran kumar chaired the committee on earth observation satellites ceos in
he has made valuable contributions to the coordination group of meteorological satellites cgms the expert team on satellite systems of the world meteorological organisation etsat of wmo and the indo us joint working group on civil space cooperation
he has also served as president of the aeronautical society of india
he is fellow of the indian national academy of engineering the national academy of sciences india the indian society of remote sensing the institution of electronics telecommunications engineers the indian society of systems for science engineering the indian meteorological society the indian society of geomatics the gujarat science academy and the andhra pradesh academy of sciences
he is also an elected member of the international academy of astronautics
in addition he has been conferred with honoris causa doctorates sc
by indian academic institutions
he has co authored publications in various national and international scientific journals conferences and symposiums
in recognition of his contributions he was awarded the padma shri by the president of india in
other notable honours conferred on him include the rajyotsava award the sir visvesvaraya senior scientist state award by the government of karnataka the lifetime achievement award from the karnataka science and technology academy the iisc distinguished alumnus award the gujarat ratna life for innovation award by the gujarat innovation society the lifetime achievement award by the andhra pradesh akademi of sciences the bharat ratna sir visvesvaraya centenary award by the university of mysore the modi science award the firodia vijnan ratna award the santokbaa award instituted by srkkf surat and the isro lifetime achievement award
he was also honoured with the prestigious international von karman wings award in instituted by the aerospace historical society together with the graduate aerospace laboratories at the california institute of technology and with the chevalier de ordre national de la gion honneur the highest civilian honour of the government of france in

faculty computer science engineering iit jodhpur
faculty welcome to faculty position the department of computer science and engineering at iit jodhpur invites applications for faculty positions at all levels
candidates should have phd degree in cse or related field
the candidates are expected to have excellent research track record and commitment towards teaching
while we encourage candidates from all areas of cse to apply special emphasis will be given to the following areas algorithms quantum computation information security database systems data engineering cloud technologies edge and fog computing computer graphics animation augmented and virtual reality data visualisation computer vision human machine interface information retrieval artificial intelligence and machine learning natural language understanding software systems and engineering programming languages and compilers social and complex networks autonomous systems high performance computing parallel programming gpu programming distributed systems os and networking 5g and 5g systems sensors and iot
about iit jodhpur iitj has sprawling campus of over acres with students and faculty members with the department of cse having faculty members
the department coordinates the btech mtech and mtech phd programs in cse and ai along with phd in cse
more details about the department can be found at
the institute also houses the technology and innovation hub on cv ar and vr
any indian national pio or foreign national is eligible to apply
the rules of government of india will be applicable for terms and conditions of the appointments
we offer salary and benefits as per the norms of the central government
benefits include relocation expenses maternity paternity leaves generous initiation grant phd student support on campus housing if available access to on campus medical facilities access to on campus sports facilities etc
in case of any clarification candidates may reach out to
interested candidates are encouraged to apply via
why choose iit jodhpur opportunity to work with diverse group of very talented faculty members in diverse areas of computer science
the department and the institute highly also encourage inter departmental collaboration
the department has high end computational facilities available in addition to the central facilities available with the institute
some of the departmental facilities include dgx multiple servers vanet lab and ar vr lab
the dgx2 server is high performance computing system designed specifically for artificial intelligence ai and deep learning applications
this server is equipped with nvidia tesla v100 gpus which provide massive parallel processing power and high bandwidth memory to support large scale machine learning models
it comes with nvlink technology which enables fast inter connectivity between gpus as well as high speed nvme storage system for efficient data processing
with these capabilities the dgx2 server can handle demanding ai workloads with ease making it an ideal resource for researchers and developers in the department
the department also has several high end workstations servers with nvidia a5000 and nvidia 1080ti designed for individual use
these workstations are equipped with powerful cpus high speed storage and advanced gpus making them suitable for range of computational tasks including data analysis machine learning and scientific computing
the department has several servers that are used for various purposes including web hosting database management and file storage
these servers are equipped with powerful cpus and storage making them suitable for handling large amounts of data and serving multiple users simultaneously
generous seed grant of rs
lakhs for new faculty members to kick off their research
engage in the department growth by being part of designing the policies and course curriculum
regular talks by leading experts in various disciplines
location at the picturesque jodhpur campus close to mother nature
freedom to organise events and activities for the advancement of your research in the community
enthusiastic departmental staff members to handle day to day requests
eligibility scale of pay selection procedure apply online important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations web policy web information manager feedback cert in help nirf internal committee intranet links copyright all rights reserved this portal is owned designed and developed by digital infrastructure automation iit jodhpur

mathematics iit jodhpur
welcome to the department of mathematics mathematics being the basis of many disciplines is subject that evolves with time and creates new theories to solve real world challenging problems
our department has been taking leading role in developing new methods to model such situations that can be used in diverse areas of computer science engineering and basic sciences
the department has faculty with research interests in the areas of algebra mathematical physics scientific computation numerical analysis partial differential equations topological dynamics low dimensional chaos dynamical systems renormalization in low dimensional dynamics wavelet analysis fractional transform theory image processing financial risk analysis categorical data analysis reliability theory applied probability
we are excited to offer high quality programs at postgraduate level for students who wish to apply math to science or engineering such as two year sc
program in mathematics four year sc tech program in mathematics data and computational sciences two year tech program in data and computational sciences
we also offer an tech ph dual degree program in data and computational sciences and ph
program with specialization in different areas of mathematics to those who wish to earn deeper understanding of pure and applied mathematics
workshop on lean list of provisionally shortlisted candidates for ph entrance examination for semester ii of th international conference on nonlinear applied analysis and optimization icnaao from the head of the department welcome to the department of mathematics
the department of mathematics is dedicated to advancing the fields of pure mathematics applied mathematics and statistics
our vision is to emphasize both the fundamental principles of core mathematics and the foundational concepts essential for analyzing key principles applied in cutting edge technologies
since its establishment the department has been actively engaged in research across various critical areas of mathematics and computing
the department also aimed to explore modern aspects of mathematics coupled with computational capabilities to develop workforce specialized in mathematical aspects of key technologies
with this inclination the department initiated academic programs to address the mathematical needs of both industry and academia
currently we offer various programmes namely two year sc
program in mathematics four year sc tech program in mathematics data and computational sciences two year tech program in data and computational sciences read more head message latest events view all events mar invited talk by dr sushil bhunia on 19th march at pm feb research seminar by dr abhishek kumar singh on feb jan invited talk by prof basant lal sharma on january at 12pm announcement view all announcement ph
admission results semester ii ay merit list of provisionally shortlisted candidates for ph
admission list of provisionally shortlisted candidates for ph entrance examination for semester ii latest news view all news workshop on lean the department of mathematics is organizing an introductory workshop on the lean proof assistant from 26th to 28th february

director indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur
director professor avinash kumar agarwal director iit jodhpur professor avinash kumar agarwal took over the charge of director iit jodhpur on may
he obtained his undergraduate degree in mechanical engineering from malviya regional engineering college jaipur and his mtech energy and phd energy from the indian institute of technology iit delhi
after his post doctoral fellowship at the erc uw madison usa he returned to india in and joined iit kanpur
he was visiting professor at the university of loughborough uk photonics institute university of vienna austria hanyang university and kaist south korea
prof agarwal is interested in research in ic engines combustion conventional and alternative fuels methanol dme hydrogen hcng fuelled engine development lca and tco analyses fuel sprays lubricating oil tribology optical diagnostics laser ignition hcci particulates and emission control and large bore engines
he has developed laser fired hydrogen and cng engines in automotive sizes and developed the first electronic fuel injection system equipped with locomotive engine for indian railways
currently prof agarwal is developing methanol and dme fuelled engines vehicles for the automotive agricultural sectors
prof agarwal has published over peer reviewed international journal and conference papers edited books and book chapters attracting scopus and google scholar citations
prof agarwal is the editor of fuel editor in chief of the journal of energy and environmental sustainability associate editor of the asme journal of energy resources technology asme open journal of engineering international journal of vehicle systems modelling and testing and the journal of the institute of engineers series and an editorial board member of imeche international journal of engine research
he edited wiley vch germany handbook of combustion volumes pages the most updated combustion compilation globally
for his outstanding contributions prof agarwal is conferred upon sir bose national fellowship by serb sae india foundation guru award wsset innovation award clarivate analytics india citation award in engineering and technology prestigious shanti swarup bhatnagar prize in engineering sciences rajib goyal prize in physical sciences nasi reliance industries platinum jubilee award inae silver jubilee young engineer award dr raman young teachers award sae ralph teetor educational award insa young scientist award uict young scientist award inae young engineer award devendra shukla research fellowship poonam and prabhu goyal endowed chair professorship sbi endowed chair professorship at iit kanpur aicte career award for young teachers dst young scientist award and dst boyscast fellowship in addition to inaugural version of distinguished alumni award by mnit jaipur and distinguished alumni award by iit delhi
prof agarwal is highly cited researcher in and is among the top ten hcrs from india among hcr researchers globally in fields of enquiry
he is india number one energy researcher in the recently declared stanford university listing of the top of researchers globally
he is an elected fellow of the society of automotive engineers international usa sae american society of mechanical engineers asme indian national academy of engineering inae international society for energy environment and sustainability isees royal society of chemistry rsc national academy of science allahabad nasi world society of sustainable energy technologies wsset american association for advancement in science aaas and combustion institute usa ci
he is featured in the dst golden jubilee coffee table book under scientists shaping today india released by vigyan prasar government of india on national science day february 28th
at iit kanpur prof agarwal has established state of the art engine research laboratory and he was also the founder director of iit kanpur science and technology research park
he also founded the international society for energy environment and sustainability in and is the editor of the book series entitled energy environment and sustainability published by springer singapore onwards

postgraduate programs computer science engineering iit jodhpur
postgraduate programs tech
computer science and engineering cse the tech program in computer science and engineering cse at iit jodhpur establishes balance between traditional and emerging areas of the discipline by offering students combined knowledge of theory and practice
the program is designed to extend the undergraduate computing skills with up to date and in depth expertise in specialized areas of the computer science discipline
the curriculum is developed in consultation with experts from academia and industry to address the needs of both domains and open wide range of possibilities for students for their future endeavors
students are equipped with relevant concepts algorithms techniques and underpinning principles while developing the ability to solve real world problems in number of application areas such as computer systems and security distributed computing internet of things artificial intelligence and big data
detailed curriculum for tech
cse download file kb ay onwards detailed curriculum for tech
cse download file kb ay onwards details of courses offered by dept
cse download file kb regulations for postgraduate programs download file kb tech
artificial intelligence ai the tech
in artificial intelligence ai aims to fill the critical needs of the industry and to fill the gap in the availability of highly skilled ai scientists and engineers
the major goal of the two year tech
ai the program is to impart rigorous training in strong foundations of artificial intelligence as well as cutting edge ai tools and techniques and produce graduates who can reinforce the country efforts towards developing ai technologies
detailed curriculum for tech
ai download file kb ay onwards detailed curriculum for tech
ai download file kb ay onwards details of courses offered by dept
cse download file kb regulations for postgraduate programs download file kb dual master with university of albany suny ua the dual mater program in cse and cybersecurity in collaboration of university at albany suny ualbany
this is unique program that leverages the strengths of the two institutions iit jodhpur in cse and ualbany in cybersecurity
the field of cybersecurity is becoming more critical as we become more technology dependent and there is short supply of cybersecurity professionals in the united states of the order of quarter million jobs
also the field is growing rapidly
students will get an mtech in cse and an ms in cyber security
ualbany is providing dollar scholarship for our students since we are partner institution
additionally this program is stem certified in the united states which means that students will automatically get year work visa at the end of their one year at ualbany
also currently there are over quarter million open jobs in the cybersecurity
the previous set of students that have gone from iit jodhpur sme we have had placement in the industry or at education institutions for doctoral programs with full assistantships
almost all students have also been able to take assistantships at ualbany making their education even more affordable
tech ph dual degree cse tech ph dual degree ai iit jodhpur has been offering mtech phd dual degree programs since july
these programs have been designed particularly for students with an inclination for research
students who have completed their tech
are eligible to join this program
students complete their tech
course work and then start their research and earn both tech
and ph degrees at the end of the program
there are two distinct aspects of these programs first it provides an avenue for students to earn both degrees in far lesser duration compared to if these were done individually and second students are awarded fellowship equivalent to that of jrf from the date of their joining
academically these programs facilitate students to decide upon their area of research by the end of the first semester
after phase of rigorous coursework in the first two years they start working towards the academic requirements of phd that includes comprehensive exam state of the art seminar publications in top conferences and journals and thesis
the students can also work on industry projects and collaborate with faculty from other academic research bodies
this program offers the benefit of phd level scholarship from the first year itself and the integrated courses and research helps in reducing the overall time of completing mtech and phd
the department of cse is currently offering two such programs mtech phd dual degree in cse and mtech phd dual degree in ai and is continuously looking for motivated and capable students to conduct advanced research in all areas of computer science and ai please visit the research page for more details
the coursework requirements of these programs are similar to the corresponding mtech programs and other support travel support institute mobility grant fellowship schemes in addition to that from the ministry of education etc
and research related academic requirements are similar to the phd program

ai for working professionals from january the department of computer science and engineering iit jodhpur has started the executive tech
in ai program for working professionals
this program runs as combination of synchronous and asynchronous teaching
online lectures are offered on evenings or weekends for the convenience of working professionals
the minimum duration of this mode of tech
program is years and the credit requirement is the same as the regular tech in ai program at iit jodhpur
the major goal of this program is to train and enhance the skills of working professionals with strong foundations of artificial intelligence ai and state of the art ai tools and techniques and make them more industry competent

doctoral program chemistry iit jodhpur
doctoral program introduction the department of chemistry hosts ph program in chemistry
the objective of the program is to provide unique opportunities and vibrant environment to the motivated researchers to perform research in both fundamental and applied areas of chemistry
our phd program provides opportunities to students in wide array of chemical disciplines including computational molecular biophysics and gas phase reaction dynamics quantum information processing biophysical chemistry using fluorescence spectroscopy and nmr nanomaterials nanodevices advanced materials chemistry asymmetric catalysis natural products medicinally active compounds synthesis catalysis for energy environment remidiation water and soil chemistry asymmetric and homogeneous catalysis synthesis of organic compounds alternative biofuels main group organometallic chemistry
phd students have the freedom to choose their courses and research topics for thesis research
moreover we encourage graduate students to rotate in several different labs for first semester while taking the courses under guidance of department research committee drc
phd students have many opportunities for professional development including teaching communication networking outreach and participation in regional national and international conferences and meetings
they are also part of departmental committees such as seminars classes etc
these activities together with research make our students competitive for many career paths that include academia industry government and national laboratories among others
the institute offers unique opportunity to phd student to avail one year fellowship for any translational activities related to the thesis upon submission
the patent landscaping being an integral part of the research plan and phd curriculum at iit jodhpur is another unique feature
important note rolling advertisement for admission to ph programs link to fill online application form for further information click here for information about research areas applicants are strongly advised to visit the webpages of faculty members contact us issues related to online application issues related to payments details about phd program watch follow connect facebook twitter note students can apply for phd position throughout the year
interviews for prospective doctoral students are held twice during the year may and december following which they can join from the semester beginning after getting accepted
candidates get enrolled to the department and take course work in consultation with the department research committee and faculty advisor and generally start their research work under the respective faculty member from the second semester
doctoral students are also engaged in teaching assistantship ta duties in supervising undergraduate laboratories and courses
students enrolled in phd program of department may contact drc drc chairman prof sandip murarka drc convenor and ph
program coordinator prof rakesh kumar sharma drc member and sc
program coordinator prof ananya debnath important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations web policy web information manager feedback cert in help nirf internal committee intranet links copyright all rights reserved this portal is owned designed and developed by digital infrastructure automation iit jodhpur

indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur
about iit jodhpur indian institute of technology jodhpur was established in to foster technology education and research in india
the institute is committed to technological thought and action to benefit the economic development of india
scholarship in teaching and learning scholarship in research and creative accomplishments and relevance to industry are three driving forces for us at iit jodhpur
iit jodhpur functions from its sprawling residential permanent campus of acres on national highway north northwest of jodhpur towards nagaur
this campus is meticulously planned and envisioned to stand as symbol of academics simple but deep
